Name: PLT_LATTICE_BULB
VisualSummary: Waist-high hollow polygon bulb clusters with dark interior ribs.
Palette: Frosted glass white; smoky grey; black ribbing
GameplayRead: Food / tuber source; easy-to-read edible geometry.

Name: PLT_SPIRAL_REED
VisualSummary: Corkscrew reeds with banded fibers and faintly luminous tips.
Palette: Muted straw; soft teal glow; damp brown root beds

Name: PLT_MELTPOD_RIND
VisualSummary: Ceramic pods fused to warm rock; seams part at dusk exposing wet gel interiors.
Palette: Warm beige; ember orange seams; wet amber gel

Name: PLT_EMBER_LACE
VisualSummary: Foil-thin filament veils on stone faces. Orange micro-veins pulse under raking light.
Palette: Burnt orange; metallic copper; dark shadow stone

Name: PLT_NULLMINT_NODES
VisualSummary: Pebble-like nodules in dark moss mats. Crushing releases cooling vapor.
Palette: Black moss; pale mint vapour; grey nodules

Name: PLT_KNIFELEAF_FAN
VisualSummary: Radial fans of rigid translucent silica-sharp leaves. Reads like a hazard sign.
Palette: Clear smoky glass; silver edge light

Name: PLT_RESIN_CHIMNEY
VisualSummary: Stubby chimney stalks venting resin mist. Build layered collars over time.
Palette: Tar brown; amber resin; sulfur yellow accents

Name: PLT_SILK_CYST_VINE
VisualSummary: Creeping vine masses with smooth teardrop cysts that unspool pale filaments when cut.
Palette: Wet olive; pearl white filaments; dark stems

Name: PLT_MAWCAP_BLOOM
VisualSummary: Heavy stalk fungus with lip-like cap aperture. Coughs spore bursts when disturbed.
Palette: Rot green; fleshy beige; bruised purple underside

Name: PLT_THREADMOLD_SHEET
VisualSummary: Matte-black membrane mats on surfaces. Fine thread-lines crawl beneath skin under light.
Palette: Black velvet; oil sheen thread highlights

Name: PLT_FERRIC_BLOOM
VisualSummary: Metallic petal forms with dull red magnetic sheen. Orient toward local fields.
Palette: Dark iron red; gunmetal; black stems

Name: PLT_CRYSTAL_LICHEN
VisualSummary: Angular crystalline plates like mineral growth until gel beads form at edges.
Palette: Blue-white; clear crystal; cold grey rock

Name: PLT_CINDER_THORN
VisualSummary: Low black shrub with ember-red thorn clusters and ash pods.
Palette: Charcoal black; ember red; ash grey
GameplayRead: Painful harvest flora; visual warning plant.

Name: PLT_IRONBRINE_CUPS
VisualSummary: Cup-shaped saline growths collecting rust-colored mineral brine. Rims gleam with salt.
Palette: Oxide red; brine green; white salt bloom

Name: TRE_GLASSBARK
VisualSummary: Pale translucent bark tree with visible internal rib structure. Sheds glassy flakes.
Palette: Milky white; pale cyan; grey wood core

Name: TRE_SLAGROOT
VisualSummary: Squat heat-scarred tree with fused root pedestal. Bark crazed by thermal stress.

Name: TRE_VELVETSPINE
VisualSummary: Tall trunk with soft-looking ribs hiding stiff spines. Visually promises flexibility and danger.
Palette: Deep brown; dusty mauve; pale ridges

Name: TRE_ASTERBARK
VisualSummary: Dark hardwood with star-like mineral flecks that glitter under moving light.
Palette: Black-brown; silver sparkle; iron red undertones
